turns.final_answer:
I compared the trend in FGM prevalence among girls aged 15-19 in Somalia with Ethiopia, Kenya, and Sudan:

- Somalia has consistently very high prevalence rates, close to 99% from 1990 to 2020.
- Sudan also shows high rates around 88-89% in the period 1984 to 2014.
- Ethiopia has moderately high but declining rates from about 82% in 1986 down to around 48% in 2016.
- Kenya has much lower prevalence and a clear decline, from 32% in 1992 down to about 9% in 2022.
